title: Cycle 10 BE#5 Drift Telemetry Signal Schema (v0.1)
description: Publishable drift-telemetry signal schema for kernel-coach workflow primitive (apparatus-component-#1). Authored at Cycle-10-S6 BE#5 actual-fire per ROADMAP §2.5 + REQUIREMENTS §1 #3 + Cycle 9 4-class drift cascade (FINDINGS §3.3 + PAT-2). Item 2 (a) BINDING: drift_classes is the extension surface — new classes added by namespace-append (deprecated classes preserved with rank=deprecated per Wikidata pattern + ROADMAP §2.5 (c) verbatim). HC-11 partition: schema PUBLISHABLE; drift-detection internal algorithm + Round 1/3 validation logic = pipeline-IP-private per Binding 8.
lock_commit: PENDING (resolves at BE#5 first promotion commit per ACCEPTANCE §0 pre_registration_commit sequence)

authority.tier_3: ~/cycle_10_autonomous_cycle_apparatus_build/ROADMAP.md §2.5 + docs/LANDSCAPE_ASSESSMENT.md §1.K + §6b.1 row 1 e7b27da + SI ACTIVE bd1e803

item_2_evolution_design_binding.a_extension_mechanism_live: New drift class added by namespace-append: kernel-coach consumes new drift_classes[].name without spec edit (namespace-driven dispatch at cycle_10.be5.kernel_coach.drift.*). Base 4 classes preserved per v0.1 lock.
item_2_evolution_design_binding.b_hypothetical_extension_test_passes: Cycle 11 first-run worked-example adds cycle_11_content_fidelity_drift_signal_X to drift_classes; kernel-coach consumes new class + emits >=1 event of new class at outputs/be5_cycle_11_worked_example_events.jsonl. Test at tests/test_be5_cycle_11_first_run_drift_signal.py asserts PASS.
item_2_evolution_design_binding.c_v01_to_v02_migration_path: Base 4 drift_classes preserved across v0.1.x patch + v0.2 feature releases; new classes additive (append-only enum positions); deprecated classes marked rank=deprecated (Wikidata pattern; kept in schema; emit only by legacy kc versions). kc-1..kc-17 PD file format preserved per ROADMAP §2.5 (c) verbatim.

drift_classes.name: content_fidelity_drift
drift_classes.description: Content authored at session boundary diverges from upstream artifact citation (e.g., quote attributed to source not in source; data substrate stale per S181 freshness BINDING). Detected by Round 1 / Round 3 cross-reference check against canonical sources.

drift_classes.name: scope_drift
drift_classes.description: Session work drifts beyond cycle SI §3 IN scope into SI §3 OUT items (e.g., Cycle 11+ content fidelity / Cycle 12-13 write-hook bundled into Cycle 10 work). Per Cycle 10 SI §3 + ED §Field 6 (e) single-cycle scope-creep KILL trigger.
drift_classes.lineage: Cycle 9 FINDINGS §3.3 PAT-2 cascade + Cycle 10 SI §3 OUT verbatim

drift_classes.name: paradigm_misclassification
drift_classes.description: An item is classified operational when it is paradigm (or vice versa) per SI §5 bidirectional pre-escalation gate (end-state test + gotcha #16 + S176 protocol-supersedes-test). Detected at Round 1 by inline 3-test gate fire; HALT severity if gate verdict is 'paradigm_escalate' but session proceeded operationally.
drift_classes.lineage: SI §5 bidirectional pre-escalation gate + Rex feedback memory paradigm-vs-operational-classification + gotcha #16

drift_classes.name: phase_scope_violation
drift_classes.description: Session work crosses phase scope (e.g., Stage 3-4 RP authoring drifts into Stage 5 build authoring; carried items mid-research-cycle violate phase discipline per Rex feedback memory phase_scope_discipline S153 'stop drifting ot 006'). Detected at Round 1 by phase scope check against SI §3 + active stage substrate.
drift_classes.lineage: Cycle 9 FINDINGS §3.3 PAT-2 cascade + Rex S153 phase_scope_discipline feedback memory

schema_extension_rules.rule_1_append_only: New drift classes appended at end of drift_classes array; existing positions unchanged. Per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 2 invariant.
schema_extension_rules.rule_2_rank_lifecycle: Drift class rank lifecycle: active (default) -> deprecated (kept in schema; emit only by legacy versions; rank=deprecated Wikidata pattern). Removal forbidden per Item 2 (c) backwards-compat.
schema_extension_rules.rule_3_severity_default_required: Every drift class declares severity_default in {INFO, WARN, HALT}; calibration-hook per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §5 asserts this at every commit.
schema_extension_rules.rule_4_lineage_citation_required: Every drift class cites lineage source (Cycle 9 FINDINGS reference or SI binding or Rex feedback memory item). HC-07 every-claim-to-source BINDING.
schema_extension_rules.rule_5_cycle_11_extension_example: Cycle 11 first-run worked-example: append cycle_11_content_fidelity_drift_signal_X with rank=active + severity_default=WARN + lineage=Cycle 11 first-run-under-apparatus content-fidelity validation. Verified by tests/test_be5_cycle_11_first_run_drift_signal.py PASS.
schema_extension_rules.rule_6_namespace_isolation: BE#5 kernel-coach drift_classes (top-level drift_classes array) and BE#6 impl-coach drift classes (impl_coach_drift_classes array; namespace cycle_10.be6.impl_coach.drift.*) are namespace-isolated. Edits to BE#5 baseline 4 classes FORBIDDEN per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 2 invariant; BE#6 impl-coach classes appended at SEPARATE namespace key, NEVER folded into BE#5 drift_classes array. Per Cycle-10-S8 BE#6 actual-fire 2026-05-18.
schema_extension_rules.rule_7_be6_cycle_11_extension_example: Cycle 11 first-run worked-example: append cycle_11_content_fidelity_impl_coach_drift_signal_Y to impl_coach_drift_classes with rank=active + severity_default=WARN + lineage=Cycle 11 first-run-under-apparatus impl-coach content-fidelity validation. Verified by tests/test_be6_cycle_11_first_run_impl_coach.py PASS.
schema_extension_rules.rule_8_be3_namespace_isolation: BE#3 actor_trust drift classes (be3_actor_trust_drift.actor_trust_drift_classes array; namespace cycle_10.be3.actor_trust.drift.*) are namespace-isolated from BE#5 (top-level drift_classes) AND BE#6 (be6_impl_coach_drift.impl_coach_drift_classes). Edits to BE#5 baseline 4 classes OR BE#6 baseline 4 classes FORBIDDEN per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 2 invariant; BE#3 actor-trust classes appended at SEPARATE namespace key, NEVER folded into BE#5 drift_classes array OR BE#6 impl_coach_drift_classes array. Per Cycle-10-S10 BE#3 actual-fire 2026-05-18.
schema_extension_rules.rule_9_be3_cycle_11_extension_example: Cycle 11 first-run worked-example: append cycle_11_content_fidelity_actor_trust_drift_signal_Z to actor_trust_drift_classes with rank=active + severity_default=WARN + lineage=Cycle 11 first-run-under-apparatus actor-trust dispatch-decision content-fidelity validation. Verified by tests/test_be3_cycle_11_first_run_actor_trust.py PASS.
schema_extension_rules.rule_10_be2_namespace_isolation: BE#2 action_class drift classes (be2_action_class_drift.action_class_drift_classes array; namespace cycle_10.be2.action_class.drift.*) are namespace-isolated from BE#3 (be3_actor_trust_drift.actor_trust_drift_classes) AND BE#5 (top-level drift_classes) AND BE#6 (be6_impl_coach_drift.impl_coach_drift_classes). calibration_hook_path: Per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §5 calibration-hook validates: (i) drift_classes >= 4 baseline (BE#5); (ii) impl_coach_drift_classes >= 4 baseline (BE#6); (iii) every emitted drift_class is in schema enum (BE#5 OR BE#6 section per namespace); (iv) rule_1 append-only verified via git diff at schema edit; (v) rule_6 namespace-isolation verified (BE#5 drift_classes UNCHANGED at every BE#6 schema edit); (vi) Item 2 (a)(b)(c) extension-test PASS at every commit touching schema.

impl_coach_drift_classes.name: handoff_seam_violation
impl_coach_drift_classes.description: Impl-coach proceeds without valid inbound handoff substrate (kc PD §-pointer missing OR malformed OR prior impl-coach handoff path declared but unreadable) OR fails to author outbound substrate at session close OR handoff bracket invariant (>=1 inbound + >=1 outbound per run_id) violated. Per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 3 refusal mode.
impl_coach_drift_classes.lineage: REQUIREMENTS §1 #5 verbatim 'kernel-to-impl; impl-to-impl; concurrent impl coaches; failure-mode handoff' + Sub-RQ-3 + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 3 refusal mode + ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 3 handoff-seam-integrity invariant

impl_coach_drift_classes.name: implementation_drift
impl_coach_drift_classes.description: Impl-coach implementation diverges from kc-authored task scope: carried-item violation (analog of S153 phase_scope_discipline at impl-coach layer); scope expansion beyond inbound handoff §-pointer; sub-task substitution without upstream-kc approval. Distinguishes impl-layer drift from kc-layer drift per HR §3 H-D surprise note (Cycle 9 audit chain kc-14-to-15-to-16 implicit-impl-coach work surfaces this class).
impl_coach_drift_classes.lineage: Cycle 9 audit chain workspace kernel_coach_14/15/16_project_direction.md implicit-impl-coach work (n=3 of 4 sampled at BR fire 2026-05-18; kc-17 absent honest gap §9) + HR §3 H-D surprise note 'surfacing the architectural distinction IS the Cycle 10 contribution' + Rex feedback memory phase_scope_discipline S153

impl_coach_drift_classes.name: multi_coach_coordination_failure
impl_coach_drift_classes.description: Concurrent impl-coach handoffs conflict (v0.2+) OR sequential impl-coach handoffs miss bracket pair (v0.1) OR impl-to-Coach/BR outbound dispatch substrate malformed OR upstream-kc handoff substrate parse failure. Per REQUIREMENTS §1 #5 'concurrent impl coaches; failure-mode handoff' + Sub-RQ-3 + LANDSCAPE §1.M AutoGen group-chat coordination failure mode.
impl_coach_drift_classes.lineage: REQUIREMENTS §1 #5 + Sub-RQ-3 + LANDSCAPE §1.M.b disconfirming case (homogeneous-agent-class assumption violated in heterogeneous meta-coach pipeline)

impl_coach_drift_classes.name: framework_pattern_misapplication
impl_coach_drift_classes.description: CrewAI hierarchical-crew / AutoGen group-chat / Temporal Activity-vs-Workflow pattern imported but adapted incorrectly per LANDSCAPE §1.K/M/P boundary conditions: framework runtime adoption instead of pattern import (e.g., attempting to spawn LangGraph or AutoGen runtime under Claude Code); homogeneous-agent-class assumption violated; process-level vs meta-coach-level scope confusion.
impl_coach_drift_classes.lineage: LANDSCAPE §1.K.b CrewAI disconfirming case + §1.M.b AutoGen disconfirming case + §1.P.b Temporal disconfirming case + Cycle 10 SI §3 OUT 'General multi-agent framework (not the goal; specific to this pipeline)'

actor_trust_drift_classes.name: frontmatter_parse_failure
actor_trust_drift_classes.description: Frontmatter YAML malformed / required key missing / declared actor_class not matching dispatch.evaluate. Substrate-driven hook cannot resolve dispatch decision without parseable frontmatter. Per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 4 refusal mode + ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §1 row 2 pre-condition.
actor_trust_drift_classes.lineage: RC-L2 LANDSCAPE §7 HARD STRUCTURAL DP#44 BINDING + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 4 refusal mode + Cycle 9 ED §5.3.6 LANDED capability-propagation architecture (cross-validation per Binding 2)

actor_trust_drift_classes.name: hmac_chain_break
actor_trust_drift_classes.description: Macaroons HMAC chain verification verdict=BROKEN at capability.propagate event: tamper detected OR chain provenance mismatched (child.parent_macaroon_id != parent.macaroon_id) OR scope-widening attempt at append_caveat. Per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 1 attenuation-monotonic invariant + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 3 refusal mode.
actor_trust_drift_classes.lineage: RC-L2 LANDSCAPE §7 HARD STRUCTURAL DP#44 BINDING + LANDSCAPE §1.J.a Birgisson 2014 NDSS Macaroons chain tamper-detection property + Cycle 9 FINDINGS §8.2 SDK inheritance gap evidence

actor_trust_drift_classes.name: actor_class_unregistered
actor_trust_drift_classes.description: Frontmatter declares actor_class not in runtime/actor_trust_ontology.ttl registered set. Substrate-driven hook returns verdict=REFUSE_UNREGISTERED_CLASS; refuses dispatch. New class requires RDF append + frontmatter spec update BEFORE dispatch per Item 2 (a) BINDING. Per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 2 refusal mode + ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 2 invariant (4 base classes preserved).
actor_trust_drift_classes.lineage: kc-17 seed §2.1 4 base actor classes + ROADMAP §2.3 (a) extension-by-append + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 2 refusal mode

actor_trust_drift_classes.name: capability_attenuation_violation
actor_trust_drift_classes.description: Child caveat claims grant absent from parent OR scope-widening attempt detected at capability.propagate. Per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 1 attenuation-monotonic invariant — caveats only narrow capability, never widen; this drift class fires when invariant breaks. Per RC-L2 HARD STRUCTURAL DP#44 BINDING: scope-widening attempt is paradigm-class halt; Rex paradigm ruling required for any architecture-shape change per Binding 7.
actor_trust_drift_classes.lineage: LANDSCAPE §1.J.a Birgisson attenuation-monotonic property + RC-L2 LANDSCAPE §7 HARD STRUCTURAL DP#44 BINDING + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 5 refusal mode + ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 1 invariant

action_class_drift_classes.name: policy_match_violation
action_class_drift_classes.description: PaC dispatcher returns match_decision=NO_MATCH (no matched rule for tuple → implicit deny per LANDSCAPE §1.H.a Cedar canonical semantics) OR MULTIPLE_CONFLICTING (≥2 conflicting rules matched → paradigm-class halt per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 4). Per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 1 decision-determinism invariant.

action_class_drift_classes.description: PreToolUse classifier returns action_class not in runtime/action_class_ontology.ttl registered set (5 base + extensions). Substrate-driven hook returns verdict=REFUSE_UNREGISTERED_CLASS; refuses tool invocation. New class requires RDF append + ontology re-load BEFORE next invocation per Item 2 (a) BINDING. Per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 2 refusal mode + ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 2 invariant (5 base classes preserved).
action_class_drift_classes.lineage: kc-17 seed §2.1 5 base action classes + ROADMAP §2.2 (a) extension-by-append + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 2 refusal mode

action_class_drift_classes.name: routing_decision_inconsistency
action_class_drift_classes.description: Action × actor × destination tuple resolves to ≥2 conflicting decisions at route.compose OR PaC dispatcher returns inconsistent verdicts across replays of same input tuple. Per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 1 decision-determinism invariant — same input MUST produce same output. This drift fires when invariant breaks. Per RC-L3 Fuseki Shiro DESIGN-precondition: routing-layer query results may diverge if substrate access not token-verified at v0.2.
action_class_drift_classes.lineage: ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 1 decision-determinism invariant + LANDSCAPE §1.H.a Cedar request semantics + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 4 refusal mode

destination_class_drift_classes.name: class_unregistered
destination_class_drift_classes.description: PreToolUse hook intercepted tool invocation routing to destination not in runtime/destination_class_ontology.ttl registered set (5 base + extensions). Integrated hook returns verdict=REFUSE_UNREGISTERED_CLASS; refuses tool invocation. New class requires RDF append + ontology re-load BEFORE next invocation per Item 2 (a) BINDING. Per RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 2 refusal mode + ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 2 invariant (5 base classes preserved).
destination_class_drift_classes.lineage: kc-17 seed §2.1 5 base destination classes + ROADMAP §2.4 (a) extension-by-append + RUNTIME_EMIT_SPEC §3 row 2 refusal mode

destination_class_drift_classes.name: caveat_attenuation_violation
destination_class_drift_classes.description: Child 'where'-caveat claims destination grant absent from parent OR scope-widening attempt detected at macaroon.caveat. Per ARTIFACT_CONTRACT §3 row 1 attenuation-monotonic invariant — 'where'-caveats only narrow destination scope, never widen; this drift class fires when invariant breaks. Per RC-L2 HARD STRUCTURAL DP#44 BINDING carry from BE#3: scope-widening attempt is paradigm-class halt; Rex paradigm ruling required for any architecture-shape change per Binding 7.
